'''B'trillans''' were a squeaky-voiced, vaguely [[Feline/Legends|felinoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[B'trilla]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. They were often encountered as laborers on other worlds in the Reach such as [[Feldwes]], as well as in the [[Kalamith sector/Legends|Kalaminth]], [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja]], and [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sectors]], though their work ethic was not as well-regarded as their cleverness. They also possessed an agricultural colony on the drought-stricken planet [[Atorra]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
